plugins.name: Modal Form
plugins.description: Pop up a form on click, forward the answers to a channel (named or anonymous), and reply privately. Optional one-response-per-person.

presets.name: Staff Application
presets.description: Recruit moderators or helpers — name, timezone, availability, experience.

presets.name: Introduce Yourself
presets.description: Let new members introduce themselves with a quick form.

presets.name: Suggestion Box
presets.description: Collect ideas from members.

presets.name: Bug Report
presets.description: Let members report problems with steps to reproduce.

presets.name: Ban Appeal
presets.description: Let banned users appeal — one response per person.

presets.name: Contact Us
presets.description: A simple get-in-touch form.

plugins.name: Latency Check
plugins.description: Reply with your message plus a detailed latency report (click → server, dispatcher hop, handler time).

plugins.name: Self Role
plugins.description: Let members self-assign roles from a button or select menu — toggle/give/take, a pick-limit (1 = swap), per-role emoji, a 'who can use this' role gate, auto-expiring roles, and optional audit logging.

plugins.name: Tickets
plugins.description: Private support tickets from a button or topic menu — per-ticket channel, optional intake form, staff claim, close with transcript.

presets.name: General Support panel
presets.description: A simple help desk — one intake question.

presets.name: Player Report panel
presets.description: Private reports about a user, with evidence.

presets.name: Store / Billing panel
presets.description: Purchases and payments.

presets.name: Support topic menu
presets.description: One menu, several help topics.

presets.name: Community topic menu
presets.description: Partnerships, staff and suggestions.

plugins.name: Giveaway
plugins.description: Run a giveaway from a button: live entrant count, entry requirements (role / account age / one-per-person), a fair random draw of N winners, reroll, and cancel.

presets.name: Nitro giveaway
presets.description: 1 month of Discord Nitro, drawn in 24h.

presets.name: Custom Role giveaway
presets.description: An exclusive personal role, drawn in 48h.

presets.name: Game Key giveaway
presets.description: A Steam game of the winner's choice.

presets.name: Gift Card giveaway
presets.description: A digital gift card, drawn in 3 days.

presets.name: Supporter Perks giveaway
presets.description: Role + server perks for 3 winners.

plugins.name: Quick Replies
plugins.description: Attach canned replies to a button or topic menu — each one sends text, links and {user}/{server} variables privately or publicly, with optional role-gating. No bot needed.

presets.name: Server Rules reply
presets.description: Show your rules when the button is clicked.

presets.name: Getting Roles reply
presets.description: Point members at the role menu.

presets.name: Get Support reply
presets.description: Explain how to reach staff.

presets.name: Welcome reply
presets.description: A friendly start-here message.

presets.name: Support FAQ menu
presets.description: A self-serve help menu of common answers.

presets.name: Server Info menu
presets.description: Key channels, announcements and partners.

presets.name: Events & Community menu
presets.description: For game / event servers.

plugins.name: Member Origin Role
plugins.description: Send members to RoleLogic to verify where they joined from and receive the matching origin role — handled entirely by the RoleLogic bot.
plugins.setupHint: Set up RoleLogic for your server once from its dashboard — until then the verify link does nothing.

plugins.name: Top.gg Voter Role
plugins.description: Reward Top.gg voters with a role that expires on a timer (1 hour to 7 days) — votes arrive by webhook and the role is granted by the RoleLogic bot.
plugins.setupHint: Connect your Top.gg vote webhook on the RoleLogic dashboard, then paste your server's or bot's Top.gg vote page over the button URL below.

plugins.name: Genshin Player Role
plugins.description: Send players to RoleLogic to verify their Genshin Impact UID and receive roles for Adventure Rank, World Level, Spiral Abyss, achievements and region.
plugins.setupHint: Set up RoleLogic for your server once from its dashboard — until then the verify link does nothing.

plugins.name: YouTube Subscriber Role
plugins.description: Send members to RoleLogic to link YouTube with one-click Google OAuth and receive your subscriber role automatically.
plugins.setupHint: Set up RoleLogic for your server once from its dashboard — until then the verify link does nothing.

plugins.name: Twitch Follower Role
plugins.description: Send members to RoleLogic to link Twitch and receive follower and Tier 1/2/3 subscriber roles in real time via EventSub.
plugins.setupHint: Set up RoleLogic for your server once from its dashboard — until then the verify link does nothing.

plugins.name: Steam Player Role
plugins.description: Send players to RoleLogic to verify their Steam profile via OpenID and receive roles by games owned, playtime, achievements, Steam level and more.
plugins.setupHint: Set up RoleLogic for your server once from its dashboard — until then the verify link does nothing.

plugins.name: Referral Code Role
plugins.description: Members redeem a code (or scan a QR) on RoleLogic and receive the matching role — supports time-limited batches and 100k+ members per role link.
plugins.setupHint: Set up RoleLogic and create your codes from its dashboard — until then the redeem link does nothing.

plugins.name: Roblox Player Role
plugins.description: Send players to RoleLogic to verify their Roblox account and receive roles by account age, badges, gamepasses, group rank and custom per-game stats.
plugins.setupHint: Set up RoleLogic for your server once from its dashboard — until then the verify link does nothing.

plugins.name: TikTok Creator Role
plugins.description: Send creators to RoleLogic to verify their TikTok account and receive roles based on follower count, verification status, video count and likes.
plugins.setupHint: Set up RoleLogic for your server once from its dashboard — until then the verify link does nothing.

plugins.name: Form Respondent Role
plugins.description: Point the button at a RoleLogic form, quiz, poll or application — answers, score or simple submission auto-assign the matching role.
plugins.setupHint: Build your form on the RoleLogic dashboard, then paste its link (…/f/YOUR-FORM-ID) over the button URL below.

plugins.name: Kick Channel Role
plugins.description: Send members to RoleLogic to link Kick.com and receive follower, subscriber, VIP, mod and OG roles in real time — gated on tenure, gifts and more.
plugins.setupHint: Set up RoleLogic for your server once from its dashboard — until then the verify link does nothing.

plugins.name: Birthday Role
plugins.description: Members set their birthday once on RoleLogic and get timezone-aware birthday-of-the-day, zodiac, birth-month and age roles — no extra account needed.
plugins.setupHint: Set up RoleLogic for your server once from its dashboard — until then the birthday link does nothing.

plugins.name: osu! Player Role
plugins.description: Send players to RoleLogic to verify their osu! account and receive roles by global rank, PP, play count, accuracy and official groups — per game mode.
plugins.setupHint: Set up RoleLogic for your server once from its dashboard — until then the verify link does nothing.

plugins.name: Bluesky Account Role
plugins.description: Send members to RoleLogic to link Bluesky and receive roles for followers, mutuals, starter-pack and list membership, and account properties.
plugins.setupHint: Set up RoleLogic for your server once from its dashboard — until then the verify link does nothing.

plugins.name: GitHub Contributor Role
plugins.description: Send contributors to RoleLogic to link GitHub and receive roles for commits, pull requests, merged PRs and issues on any public repository.
plugins.setupHint: Set up RoleLogic for your server once from its dashboard — until then the verify link does nothing.

plugins.name: Picker
plugins.description: Attach to a User / Role / Mentionable / Channel select — a member's picks come back as mentions in a private confirmation. No bot needed.
